package rulefixtures

// scenario for sort_before_first_or_membership_only: Sorting a collection when only the first element or min/max is needed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario365Negative(values []string) string {
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	best := values[0]
	for _, value := range values[1:] {
		if value < best { best = value }
	}
	return best
}
